HELIOS Platform - Real-Time Metrics

Last updated: 2026-04-13T05:01:42.7145617-07:00

Owner Start Here

Open the full Owner Start Here guide for the detailed click-by-click setup. Use these numbered steps first when repositories are split across a personal user, business organization, or enterprise account.

  1. Find the repo owner.Open the repo URL and read the owner before the slash: personal user, organization, or enterprise-controlled org.
  2. Open repository settings.Repository → Settings. If Settings is missing, request Admin access or a transfer before changing production automation.
  3. Lock down access.Settings → Collaborators and teams / Manage access. Use least privilege and organization teams where possible.
  4. Protect the source branch.Settings → Rules → Rulesets or Settings → Branches. Require PRs, reviews, checks, and block force pushes.
  5. Reduce Actions permissions.Settings → Actions → General. Set default workflow token permissions to read-only and approve write access per workflow.
  6. Create environments.Settings → Environments. Add development, staging, and production with reviewers and scoped secrets.
  7. Publish safe docs only.Settings → Pages and Settings → General → Wikis. Keep secrets, internal endpoints, and customer data out of public pages.
  8. Track owner work.Projects, Issues → Labels, and Issues → Milestones. Track helios-platform, helios-control, and hermes-fleet-production separately.
